summary: Focused UI regression tests confirmed the import picker launch is awaited and no un-awaited coroutine behavior regressed.

commands.observation: Pytest selected 2 import-entrypoint tests and both passed; test assertions verified picker.awaited_pick_calls matched the pick_files invocations.

assertions.reason: tests/test_app.py asserts awaited_pick_calls == pick_calls for the legacy JSON import picker flow, and the focused pytest run passed.

frictions: Task subagent launch was unavailable due to permission gating, so validation was executed directly in the worker session.
